description_long: This object is a classic naval cannon mounted on a wooden wheeled carriage. The cannon barrel is long, metallic, and cylindrical with a slightly faceted surface, and it is positioned atop a rectangular wooden base. The base is constructed from dark, richly grained wood and features four polygonal wheels, two on each side, attached with visible metallic bolts. The front of the cannon is open, revealing a dark, hollow interior, while the rear is closed and slightly faceted. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements, armor plating, or modern features. The asset appears robust and functional, suitable for historical or stylized urban scenarios.
description: A classic metallic cannon mounted on a dark wooden wheeled carriage, featuring a long barrel and polygonal wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the metallic cannon barrel and the wooden carriage with two polygonal wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open muzzle of the cannon and the rectangular face of the wooden base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the barrel and carriage from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the closed end of the cannon barrel and the back of the wooden carriage.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted on top of the wooden carriage.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; surfaces are solid brown and gray.
